assertion_results.text: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
assertion_results.evidence: Frontmatter contains name: pandas-data-cleaning and description: 'Guides systematic data cleaning pipelines in pandas...'

assertion_results.text: The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning data cleaning or pandas
assertion_results.evidence: Description contains: 'Use when the user asks to clean data, wrangle a dataset, preprocess a DataFrame, fix messy columns, handle nulls or NaNs, remove duplicates, standardize column names, or convert data types in Python with pandas.'

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body covers handling missing values with code examples
assertion_results.evidence: Section '### 5. Handle missing values' (lines 110-137) includes strategy table by column type and code examples: df['age'].fillna(df['age'].median()), df['category'].fillna('Unknown'), df['is_active'].fillna(False)

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body covers deduplication with code examples
assertion_results.evidence: Section '### 4. Deduplicate rows' (lines 95-108) includes code: df = df.drop_duplicates() and df = df.drop_duplicates(subset=['id'], keep='last'), plus before/after count reporting

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body covers column name normalization or type conversion
assertion_results.evidence: Section '### 2. Normalize column names' (lines 58-74) with code: df.columns.str.strip().str.lower().str.replace(). Section '### 6. Convert types' (lines 139-165) with pd.to_datetime, pd.to_numeric, astype('category'), astype('Int64')

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body uses progressive disclosure by referencing separate files for detailed patterns
assertion_results.evidence: Line 113-114: 'See [references/cleaning-patterns.md](references/cleaning-patterns.md) for the full decision tree.' The references/cleaning-patterns.md file exists in the output directory.

assertion_results.text: An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases
assertion_results.evidence: No evals/evals.json file found. Glob search for **/evals.json in the with_skill output directory returned no results. No evals/ directory exists (scripts/ and assets/ directories are empty).

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes or pitfalls section
assertion_results.evidence: Line 195: '## Common mistakes' section with a table of 8 mistake/fix pairs covering type conversion before null handling, inplace=True, deduplication issues, etc.

assertion_results.text: The SKILL.md body contains a workflow or ordered checklist for the cleaning pipeline
assertion_results.evidence: Numbered workflow: '### 1. Load and inspect', '### 2. Normalize column names', '### 3. Drop junk columns and rows', '### 4. Deduplicate rows', '### 5. Handle missing values', '### 6. Convert types', '### 7. Validate and save'. Also a checklist section at line 184.
